Rule Name: No Log from Host over 24 hours
Splunk Rules:
| tstats count where index=* by _time host
| eventstats latest(_time) as latest_Time_host by host
| eventstats latest(_time) as latest_Time_all
| eval conditions=latest_Time_all - latest_Time_host
| eval Status=if(conditions>=86400,"Missing Data!","OK!")
| eval Alert_Severity="Medium"
| stats values(Status) as Status values(conditions) as Lost_Time_(Seconds) values(latest_Time_host) as Last_seen_on_Host values(latest_Time_all) as Real_Time by Alert_Severity host
| convert timeformat="%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S" ctime(Last_seen_on_Host) as Last_seen_on_Host,  ctime(Real_Time) as Real_Time, ctime('Lost_Time_(Seconds)') as Lost_Time_(Seconds)
| search Status="Missing Data!"

Rule Name: No Log from Source over 1 hour
Splunk Rules:
| tstats count where index=* by _time source
| eventstats latest(_time) as latest_Time_source by source
| eventstats latest(_time) as latest_Time_all
| eval conditions=latest_Time_all - latest_Time_source
| eval Status=if(conditions>=3600,"Missing Data!","OK!")
| eval Alert_Severity="High"
| stats values(Status) as Status values(conditions) as Lost_Time_(Seconds) values(latest_Time_source) as Last_seen_on_Source values(latest_Time_all) as Real_Time by Alert_Severity source
| convert timeformat="%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S" ctime(Last_seen_on_Source) as Last_seen_on_Source,  ctime(Real_Time) as Real_Time, ctime('Lost_Time_(Seconds)') as Lost_Time_(Seconds)
| search Status="Missing Data!" AND (source=`sources_filter`)
